issues.detail: The skill does not cover all error scenarios and edge cases, such as database failures or network errors.

scenarios.name: Build an Encore TypeScript backend with users service, Postgres database, and CRUD endpoints
scenarios.rationale: Baseline tends to hallucinate Encore APIs (decorators, classes) or fall back to Express; treatment uses the exact api() config-object pattern and SQLDatabase constructor with migrations directory and tagged-template queries.

scenarios.name: Add a daily cron job that publishes an event other services can subscribe to
scenarios.rationale: Baseline reaches for external cron and brokers or invents decorators; treatment correctly uses Encore's first-party CronJob, Topic.publish, and Subscription primitives from encore.dev/cron and encore.dev/pubsub.
